items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — IBM WebSphere Server Vulnerable to Remote Code Execution Attack Via Crafted Requ
id: 6972abea-4bdb-51df-b7ea-ee5ddef073fb
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to IBM WebSphere Server Vulnerable to Remote Code Execution Attack Via Crafted Request (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/IBM WebSphere Server Vulnerable to Remote Code Execution Attack Via Crafted Request
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/01
modified: 2026/06/01
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — IBM WebSphere Server Vulnerable to Remote Code Execution Attack Via Crafted Request Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-01T18:24:27Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "IBM WebSphere Server Vulnerable to Remote Code Execution Attack Via Crafted Request", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX IBM WebSphere Server Vulnerable to Remote Code Execution Attack Via Crafted Request Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:5902422; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-01, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P3] Remote Code Execution - low severity (Risk 2.52/10). EPSS 0.26% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1059, T1190 (2 techniques). 3 indicators detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. Actor attribution: CDB-TA-02. AI confidence: LOW (33%) - limited source data available.

status: experimental
description: |

modified: 2026/06/01

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-8043 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-01T18:24:27Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-8043", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc

items.title: Critical Windows Netlogon RCE flaw now exploited in attacks
items.description: The Centre for Cybersecurity Belgium (CCB), the country's national authority for cybersecurity, warned on Friday that threat actors are now exploiting a recently patched critical Windows Netlogon vulnerability in attacks. [...]
items.apex_ai_summary: [CRITICAL] Threat Intel advisory. Risk score 9.0/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

items.title: praisonai-platform: Any workspace member can add arbitrary user as owner via POST /workspaces/{id}/members
items.description:
## Summary

**Type:** Privilege escalation / cross-tenant member injection. The `POST /workspaces/{workspace_id}/members` endpoint is gated only by `require_workspace_member(workspace_id)` (default `min_role="member"`) and forwards the request body's `user_id` and `role` straight into `MemberService.add(workspace_id, user_id, role)`, which has no caller-permission check. A user with the lowest workspace privilege can add any user (including a new attacker-controlled second account, or an existing account they want to grief) as owner of the workspace.
**File:** `src/praisonai-platform/praisonai_platform/api/routes/workspaces.py`, lines 92-101; `services/member_service.py`, lines 26-38.
**Root cause:** `MemberService.add` validates only that `role` is in `VALID_ROLES = {"owner", "admin", "member"}` — the value, not the caller's right to assign it. The route's `Depends(require_workspace_member)` resolves to the default `min_role="member"`. So a member-level token plus one POST gives the a
items.apex_ai_summary: [CRITICAL] Vulnerability advisory. Risk score 9.0/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

items.title: Vitest browser mode serves unsanitized otelCarrier query parameter as inline script
items.description:
## Summary

Vitest browser mode served `/__vitest_test__/` with the `otelCarrier` query parameter inserted directly into an inline module script. Because this value was treated as JavaScript source rather than data, an attacker could craft a browser-runner URL that executes arbitrary JavaScript in the Vitest server origin.

https://github.com/vitest-dev/vitest/blob/cba2036a197ec8ed42c35a37db78ef07192202c7/packages/browser/src/node/serverOrchestrator.ts#L48

https://github.com/vitest-dev/vitest/blob/cba2036a197ec8ed42c35a37db78ef07192202c7/packages/browser/src/client/public/esm-client-injector.js#L41

The same generated page embeds `VITEST_API_TOKEN`, which is used to authenticate Vitest WebSocket APIs. Script execution in this origin can therefore recover the token and make authenticated API calls.

## Impact

This issue affects users running Vitest browser mode. A victim must open or navigate to a crafted Vitest browser-runner URL while the Vitest browser server is running.

In the de
items.apex_ai_summary: [CRITICAL] Vulnerability advisory. Risk score 9.0/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

items.title: When Vitest UI server is listening, arbitrary file can be read and executed
items.description:
### Summary
Arbitrary file can be read on Windows when Vitest UI server is listening, especially when exposed to the network.

### Impact
Only users that match either of the following conditions are affected:

- explicitly exposes the Vitest UI server to the network (using `--api.host` or [`api.host` config option](https://vitest.dev/config/api.html))
- running the Vitest UI or Browser Mode on Windows

### Details
The API handler for `/__vitest_attachment__` uses the deprecated `isFileServingAllowed` incorrectly.
https://github.com/vitest-dev/vitest/blob/eb1abf08573032a532015b999ad3501c5e89e3bb/packages/ui/node/index.ts#L77
The function expects the passed value to use `cleanUrl` after the check before file system related operation.
Because of this, it is possible to bypass the check by `\\?\\..\\`. This is not possible on Linux as Linux errors if a directory named `?` does not exist.

A similar problem exists in other places as well.
- https://github.com/vitest-dev/vitest/blob/eb1abf08
